nodes.name: Watch Fathom Emails
nodes.notes: Polls Gmail every 5 min for unread emails from Fathom.

nodes.name: Fetch Full Email
nodes.notes: Fetches full email via Gmail API - n8n Gmail node strips body content.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.all()[0].json;
return data.tasks.map(task => ({ json: { ...task, client: { ...data.client, clickup_space_id: data.clickup_space_id } } }));

nodes.name: Create ClickUp Tasks
nodes.notes: Creates tasks via ClickUp API. Looks up lists from space ID dynamically, matches AI's list_type to the correct list.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: 'Meeting Notes: ' + $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.meeting_title + ' - ' + $('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.meeting_date, mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.document', parents: [$('Prepare ClickUp Tasks + Notes').first().json.google_drive_folder_id] }) }}

nodes.name: Create Meeting Doc
nodes.notes: Creates empty Google Doc in client Drive folder via Drive API.

nodes.name: Write Meeting Notes
nodes.notes: Uploads HTML content to Google Doc via Drive API upload endpoint.
